title: K0NSULT uni0nai DID-Agent
description: Soulbound identity document for a NON-HUMAN agent. Doctrine: claim<=proof, agents-not-people (zero person PII), soulbound != crypto (non-transferable), No Password Custody (public key only, tool never holds a private key). conformance.mjs enforces the KEY rules (R1..R5) marked below; this schema is the human-readable contract.

id.description: DID of the agent, e.g. did:agent:k0:0001.

subject_type.description: R1 (enforced): MUST equal the constant 'agent'. Any other value or absence => FAIL. Guarantees no natural person is the subject.

public_key.description: R5 (enforced): public key material only. Private-key fields (private_key, secret_key, seed, mnemonic, JWK 'd') anywhere in the document => FAIL. The tool never generates or holds a private key; signing happens with the operator, outside the tool.

skills.description: R3 (enforced): each skill MUST carry a non-empty evidence_class. A skill without evidence_class => FAIL (claim<=proof).

evidence_class.description: Evidence tier backing the skill claim (e.g. A/B/C).

token.description: R4 (enforced): soulbound token. non_transferable MUST be exactly true. Any transfer-shaped field (transfer, transferable, transfer_to, transfer_hook, approve, allowance, ...) => FAIL. Soulbound is an identity binding, NOT a crypto asset.

$comment: R2 (enforced by conformance.mjs, not expressible cleanly per-property here): person PII keys (person, email, pesel, national_id) are forbidden ANYWHERE in the document tree => FAIL.
